specs.summary: Main spec for production build pipeline. Defines R1-R7 covering tree shaking, code splitting, minification, source maps, CSS pipeline, asset pipeline, and define replacement. Gaps: R2 preload hints + manual chunks, R4 source map chaining, R6 asset URL rewriting + image optimization.
Tree shaking with DCE, ESM/CJS analysis, side effects. Fully implemented. Reference for JSON tree-shaking gap.
CSS pipeline with lightningcss, Tailwind JIT. Reference for CSS asset URL rewriting gap.
Scope hoisting. Done. Background context only.

codebase_explored.summary: Code splitting. Missing: preload hints, manual chunks config.
Image processing TODO stub. Needs actual compression.
Asset processor. Missing: JSON tree-shake, CSS URL rewrite.
Bundler orchestrator. Integration point for preload hints and HTML output.
